item.smart_worldshaper.smart_worldshaper: _Targeted block_ will become the _material_ placed by the shaper.
Applies currently selected _Brush_ and _Tool_ at the targeted location.
Tool for large-scale _landscaping_ from a distance.
message.smart_worldshaper.not_enough_blo: You do not have enough blocks in your inventory.
message.smart_worldshaper.cleared_with_d: Worldshaper cleared %s blocks and dropped %s items.
message.smart_worldshaper.cleared_withou: Worldshaper cleared %s blocks. Drops are disabled.
message.smart_worldshaper.drop_limit: Worldshaper drop limit reached; additional blocks were cleared without drops.
message.smart_worldshaper.action_limit: Worldshaper action limit reached; only %s blocks were processed.
